body_md: Kickoff (2026-07-13): phase-1 harness validation done in one session. Next: (a) 004-dimension-sweep to test the eps/sqrt(d) scaling claim, (b) learned-model phase (logistic regression) where the targeted direction is estimated from weights, with multi-seed variance. Also: ingest the adversarial-examples prior art via reref discover before writing related work.
